phases.name: Globals
phases.description: Account-wide prerequisites: Terraform state backend, new target KMS keys, OIDC provider.

pre_cutover.description: Verify both profiles authenticate (aws sts get-caller-identity).

during_cutover.description: Create Terraform state bucket + lock table in target.
Apply IAM module: new KMS keys (orders-s3-cmk, orders-rds-cmk), GitHub OIDC provider, roles.

post_cutover.description: Record new target KMS key ARNs into tfvars for downstream modules.

phases.name: Networking
phases.description: VPC, subnets, route tables, security groups in target.

during_cutover.description: Apply networking module (AZ literals -> data.aws_availability_zones lookups).

post_cutover.description: Confirm sg-rds ingress references resolved to new target SG IDs.

phases.name: Storage Containers
phases.description: Empty S3 buckets (no data) with parameterized KMS references.

during_cutover.description: Apply storage module: create empty acme-prod-orders-assets + acme-prod-orders-logs.

phases.name: Database Containers
phases.description: RDS subnet group + parameter group + SG. The instance itself appears via data-plane snapshot-restore.

during_cutover.description: Apply databases module: subnet group, parameter group, RDS SG. NO instance created here.

phases.name: Compute Containers
phases.description: Lambda, EC2 launch templates, ALB, target groups. EC2 launches from cross-account-shared AMIs (shared in data plane).

pre_cutover.description: Confirm source AMI ami-0source1111111111 has been shared to target (data-plane pre-staging).

during_cutover.description: Apply compute module: ALB, target groups, Lambda (EIP literal remapped), EC2 launch templates.

post_cutover.description: Smoke test target ALB DNS directly (before DNS swap).

phases.name: DNS Scaffolding
phases.description: Create the target hosted zone + records, but do NOT swap production traffic. No production cutover here.

during_cutover.description: Apply dns module: create zone records pointing at target ALB under a staging record. Production swap is a data-plane step.

phases.name: Control Plane Validation
phases.description: Verify the empty target shape is complete and correct before any data moves.

during_cutover.description: terraform plan shows no diff; all modules applied; counts match the migration plan.

criteria: All control-plane modules applied and terraform plan is clean.
Target KMS keys exist and grants for source account are ready to request.
Source AMI shared to target account.
Operator has attached target-cutover-data-plane.json IAM policy (in addition to control-plane policy).
